goalSummary.oneLine: Drive purchases for a Mother's Day skincare gift set campaign in the US with a $20,000 budget, emphasizing 20% off and on-time delivery.
assumptions: Landing page is mobile-friendly and can clearly show discount, shipping cutoff, and trust signals above the fold.
Inventory can support increased demand during the peak week.
openQuestions: Do you have best-seller SKUs or bundles that consistently convert better (so we can prioritize them in PMax assets)?
What is your typical gross margin (rough range) to sanity-check the ROAS target?

recommendedMix.why: Capture high-intent queries like "Mother's Day gift set" where users are actively looking to buy.
recommendedMix.when: Run throughout; increase budgets during peak and final push.

recommendedMix.why: Expand reach across Shopping/Display/YouTube with asset-based messaging and let the system find converting audiences.
recommendedMix.when: Start in warmup to allow learning; keep stable settings during peak.

recommendedMix.why: Bring back visitors who viewed or added to cart but did not purchase, especially near shipping cutoff.
recommendedMix.when: Always-on; intensify final push with urgency creatives.

budgetAllocation.ruleOfThumb: Prioritize high-intent demand; scale budget on top converting themes.
Give enough budget for learning; keep assets refreshed but avoid frequent resets.
Reserve budget to capture warm audiences and protect efficiency near the deadline.

flightPlan.goal: Collect data and find winning messages/keywords.
actions: Launch Search with core gift + skincare intent themes.
Launch PMax with 2-3 asset directions (discount, free shipping, gift wrap).
Set remarketing audiences (viewed, ATC, checkout) and exclusions (purchasers).

flightPlan.goal: Scale volume while keeping CPA/ROAS within target range.
actions: Shift more budget to top converting Search themes and PMax asset groups.
Refresh ad copy to emphasize "20% off" + "gift wrap" benefits.
Monitor search terms daily and add negatives to avoid low-intent clicks.

flightPlan.goal: Maximize conversions with urgency and shipping cutoff clarity.
actions: Switch messaging to urgency: "Arrives before Mother's Day" and cutoff date.
Increase remarketing bids/budget for ATC/checkout segments.
Ensure landing page above-the-fold shows cutoff, delivery promise, and trust badges.

examples: last minute mother's day gifts delivery

signals: Custom: users searching Mother's Day gifts + skincare gifts
Customer list (if available) for suppression and upsell

notes: CTR 是“看到广告的人里有多少人点了”，像海报吸不吸引人；CTR 低通常要优先改文案/关键词意图或受众。
如果 CPC 很高但转化不多，常见原因是关键词太泛或落地页说服力不足，需要用否定词+更高意图主题来收紧流量。

descriptions: Shop Mother’s Day skincare gift sets with 20% off, free shipping, and free gift wrap. Order early for on-time delivery.
A premium gift box Mom will love. Limited-time discount, fast shipping, and beautiful gift wrapping included.
Send a thoughtful skincare gift set with delivery before Mother’s Day. Shop best-sellers and bundles today.
20% off for a limited time. Free gift wrap and free shipping—perfect for Mother’s Day gifting.
Order by the cutoff date to arrive before Mother’s Day. Trusted skincare essentials in one gift set.

assetDirections: Lifestyle: warm family moment + gift unboxing (premium feel).
ValueProp: bold "20% off" + "Free gift wrap" badge in first frame.
ShippingUrgency: show cutoff date + "Arrives before Mother's Day" callout.
Trust: include reviews/ratings and clean ingredient or dermatologist-tested claims (only if true).
landingPageSuggestions: 首屏同时展示：20% off + Free shipping + Gift wrap + 截单日期（很醒目）。
把“节日前送达”做成固定条幅（尤其移动端），减少用户犹豫。
增加信任信息：评价/退换政策/支付方式/客服入口（不要夸大功效）。

campaignStructure: Create 1 Search campaign for high-intent Mother's Day + skincare gift queries; split ad groups by keyword theme (GiftIntent / SkincareGift / ShippingUrgency).
Create 1 PMax campaign focused on the Mother's Day landing page; split asset groups by message direction (Discount / GiftWrap / ShippingUrgency).
Create 1 Remarketing campaign (Display/YouTube/Discovery based on what you use) with audiences: ViewContent 7d, ATC 14d, Checkout 30d; exclude Purchasers 180d.
biddingAndBudget: Warmup: keep budgets stable for 3-5 days to let learning start; avoid frequent edits.
If you have enough conversion volume, move toward tROAS/tCPA gradually; otherwise start with Max Conversions and tighten traffic with keywords/negatives.
Allocate daily budgets based on the percentage split; increase budget only after identifying winning segments.
trackingChecklist: Verify purchase conversion fires once per order (no duplicates).
Add-to-cart and begin-checkout events are tracked (helps diagnose funnel).
Check GA4: traffic acquisition + landing page report + ecommerce purchase funnel.
Reconcile: Ads platform conversions vs actual orders (expect differences due to attribution windows).

optimizationActions.action: Launch Search with the 3 core keyword themes and review search terms daily; add negatives for low-intent traffic (ideas/free/diy).
optimizationActions.expectedImpact: Reduce wasted spend and improve CPA/ROAS by concentrating on higher-intent queries.
howToValidate: Within 3-5 days, compare CPA/ROAS for cleaned themes vs before negatives.
Watch CTR and conversion rate trend by theme.

optimizationActions.action: Update ad copy and landing page hero to clearly show the shipping cutoff date and delivery promise.
optimizationActions.expectedImpact: Improve conversion rate (CVR) by reducing uncertainty and increasing urgency.
howToValidate: Track CVR on mobile vs desktop after update.
Monitor bounce rate and begin-checkout rate for the landing page.

optimizationActions.action: Create remarketing audiences (ViewContent 7d, ATC 14d, Checkout 30d) and exclude purchasers; run urgency creatives in final push.
optimizationActions.expectedImpact: Increase incremental conversions at lower CPA, especially near Mother's Day.
howToValidate: Compare remarketing CPA vs prospecting CPA.
Check assisted conversions and time-lag to purchase.

optimizationActions.action: In PMax, maintain stable settings for at least one learning window; iterate assets by message direction (Discount vs GiftWrap vs ShippingUrgency).
optimizationActions.expectedImpact: Improve efficiency over time by letting the system learn while testing clearer value propositions.
howToValidate: Compare asset group performance after 7-10 days.
Watch conversion volume and ROAS trend; avoid daily resets.

optimizationActions.action: Add trust modules: reviews, returns policy, secure checkout badges (only truthful claims) near the CTA on mobile.
optimizationActions.expectedImpact: Increase CVR by improving confidence and reducing friction.
howToValidate: Check session recordings/heatmaps if available for friction signals.

warnings: Avoid exaggerated skincare claims unless you can substantiate them. Keep messaging truthful and compliant.
